title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Wedding of Martu
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Wedding of Martu.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Wedding of Martu.

translation.text: From 'The Wedding of Martu': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
